canvas.subtitle: Multimedia, branding, graphic design, film, photography, music, and digital experiences built to hold attention and move audiences.
canvas.boardCopy: Brand storytelling, production planning, and digital growth are arranged as one connected studio workflow.

showreel.title: A cinematic reel of work in progress, directions, and formats.
showreel.description: These frames are clean placeholders for upcoming case studies, campaign visuals, edits, and studio outputs. Real client media can replace them without changing the layout system.
showreel.modalTitle: Placeholder reel, ready for final media.
showreel.modalDescription: This modal is intentionally lightweight. It previews how Tripod can present film frames, campaign edits, print sequences, and studio visuals before final media is added.

modalNotes.one: Compressed poster placeholders keep the homepage fast while real video assets are still being prepared.
modalNotes.two: The final reel can mix branding clips, photography sequences, motion snippets, and studio footage.
modalNotes.three: No fake client names or project results are shown here. Everything stays clearly replaceable.

frameA.title: Identity Launch Frames
frameA.meta: Poster direction, brand layout, and rollout placeholders

frameD.title: Studio Session Notes

timeline.title: Services arranged like an edit, not a brochure.
timeline.description: Every track reveals how Tripod moves from concept to production without breaking the story between disciplines.

video.label: Video
video.title: Videography, drone coverage, and live capture
video.description: Plan visual coverage for campaigns, launches, events, and branded stories with a workflow that supports filming, edits, and platform-ready delivery.

1.label: Track Note
1.text: Cinematic coverage, interviews, short-form edits, drone support, and live streaming pathways can be mapped in one timeline.

2.label: Use Cases
2.text: Event organizers, brands, artists, and institutions can shape coverage packages without needing separate creative vendors.

branding.label: Branding
branding.title: Brand strategy and identity direction
branding.description: Build the brand story first, then carry it into visual systems, launch assets, printed pieces, and campaign touchpoints.

1.label: Track Note
1.text: Naming support, identity planning, presentation decks, and launch kits can all live on the same production board.

2.label: Use Cases
2.text: Useful for businesses, startups, organizations, and personal brands that need stronger structure before scaling content.

design.label: Design
design.title: Graphic design, print direction, and layout systems
design.description: Shape campaign graphics, print assets, social content, and presentation surfaces with a visual language that stays consistent across formats.

1.label: Track Note
1.text: Tripod can move from concept boards to posters, flyers, social kits, signage, and print-ready layouts with fast execution.

2.label: Use Cases
2.text: Designed for promotions, events, launches, public campaigns, and creative communication that needs a stronger visual backbone.

photo.label: Photo
photo.title: Photography for brands, events, and products
photo.description: Use photography as part of a broader storytelling system, from campaign stills and event coverage to product frames and behind-the-scenes visuals.

1.label: Track Note
1.text: Photo direction can support social campaigns, web launches, media kits, brand lookbooks, and editorial content.

2.label: Use Cases
2.text: Strong for institutions, artists, campaign teams, personal brands, and businesses that need clean reusable visual assets.

motion.label: Motion
motion.title: Motion graphics and animated visual layers
motion.description: Add movement where it matters: title systems, social assets, campaign transitions, explainer visuals, and digital presentation energy.

1.label: Track Note
1.text: Motion graphics can bridge branding, video, digital marketing, and presentation design without introducing heavy production overhead.

2.label: Use Cases
2.text: Useful for product launches, recap videos, online campaigns, reels, presentation moments, and audience-facing explainers.

music.label: Music
music.title: Music production, recording support, and training
music.description: Support artists and learners through music production, vocal recording, beat making, instrument training, and creative coaching pathways.

1.label: Track Note
1.text: The studio pathway can connect lessons, practice sessions, recording support, and artist development without overcomplicating the offer.

2.label: Use Cases
2.text: Built for artists, young creatives, institutions, and anyone looking for beginner-friendly learning with practical studio energy.

digital.label: Digital
digital.title: Digital marketing, websites, and app experiences
digital.description: Carry the same art direction into websites, landing pages, digital campaigns, and product surfaces that help creative work convert.

1.label: Track Note
1.text: Digital growth work can pair messaging, design systems, campaign visuals, and modern web builds inside one workflow.

2.label: Use Cases
2.text: Helpful for businesses, startups, organizations, and campaign teams that need stronger online presentation and lead capture.

layers.title: Creative work gets stronger as the right layers come into focus.
layers.description: Select a layer to see how strategy, colour, typography, campaign thinking, and motion shape the final composition.

strategy.label: Layer {number} Strategy
strategy.title: Strategy gives the work direction.
strategy.description: Goals, audience, message, and format decisions help every later choice feel intentional instead of decorative.
strategy.effect: This layer sharpens the brief, the story angle, and the decisions that guide production support, design, and digital services.
strategy.mobileSummary: Strategy keeps the project clear before visual layers are added.

colour.label: Layer {number} Colour
colour.title: Colour sets the emotional temperature.
colour.description: Warm contrast, visual hierarchy, and controlled accents help the work feel youthful, premium, and easy to follow.
colour.effect: This layer changes mood, energy, readability, and how brand storytelling holds attention across print and screens.
colour.mobileSummary: Colour shapes mood, contrast, and recognition across the system.

typography.label: Layer {number} Typography
typography.title: Typography carries the voice.
typography.description: Headlines, captions, labels, and presentation rhythm translate creative direction into readable communication.
typography.effect: This layer affects clarity, personality, campaign hierarchy, and how fast people understand what the work is saying.
typography.mobileSummary: Typography turns the idea into a voice people can read and remember.

campaign.label: Layer {number} Campaign
campaign.title: Campaign thinking connects every output.
campaign.description: It turns separate assets into one coordinated release across social, print, web, events, and supporting media.
campaign.effect: This layer aligns posters, rollout moments, launch content, and digital growth goals so the whole studio output feels connected.
campaign.mobileSummary: Campaign logic keeps separate assets working as one release.

motion.label: Layer {number} Motion
motion.title: Motion gives the composition life.
motion.description: Transitions, reveals, waveform cues, and presentation shifts help static visuals feel active without becoming noisy.
motion.effect: This layer adds pace, emphasis, and a living-studio feel across showreels, campaign visuals, interfaces, and content teasers.
motion.mobileSummary: Motion adds energy and emphasis without overloading the page.

wall.title: A controlled wall of formats, references, and production surfaces.
wall.description: Poster placeholders, print samples, colour swatches, contact sheets, and behind-the-scenes layouts create a studio atmosphere without pretending unfinished work is final.

poster.title: Poster direction
poster.description: Layout placeholders for campaigns, launches, event art, or visual announcements.

contactSheet.title: Frame selections
contactSheet.description: A film-style overview of stills, storyboard moments, and edit references waiting for final media.

printSample.title: Print material studies
printSample.description: Structured samples for flyers, packaging, branded collateral, and other physical production surfaces.

storyboard.title: Storyboard pacing
storyboard.description: A simple sequence for motion planning, recaps, ad edits, and presentation story flow.

swatches.title: Colour language
swatches.description: Warm orange, gold, and cream accents that keep the art direction recognizable across themes.

bts.title: Production atmosphere
bts.description: Behind-the-scenes placeholders that hint at process without inventing locations, people, or equipment.

cta.title: Bring your next project into the studio.
cta.description: Whether you need branding, production support, digital growth, music work, or a campaign-ready website, Tripod can shape the next step with you.

hero.title: Creative services built for brand storytelling and digital growth.
hero.subtitle: Tripod brings creative direction, production quality, and fast execution together in one multi-service studio.
hero.highlightText: From strategy to launch assets, we keep the process focused, collaborative, and ready for real campaigns.

coreServices.subtitle: Each service is designed to work on its own or as part of a larger campaign, rollout, or content system.

featuredDevelopment.title: Web & App Development

capabilities: Responsive marketing sites and focused landing pages

Builds that support campaigns, lead capture, and brand presence

hero.title: Recording support, music production, and instrument training in one creative space.

recording.subtitle: We support vocal recording, practice takes, creative direction, and session flow in a way that feels approachable for both new and returning artists.

items.title: Vocal Direction

items.title: Artist Development
items.description: Use each session to strengthen process, confidence, and long-term growth.

training.title: Learn with structure, practice with support, and grow at your pace.

vocals.title: Vocals

bullets: Warm-up, delivery, and vocal practice support

benefits.title: A learning environment built for real creative progress.

items.title: Beginner-Friendly Learning
items.description: Sessions are structured to feel approachable while still building useful creative habits.

items.title: Practice With Purpose

items.title: Creative Coaching

items.title: Studio Connection

hero.title: A creative agency shaped around multimedia production and practical creative execution.
hero.subtitle: Tripod brings brand storytelling, visual communication, production support, design and digital services, and music and creative training into one connected creative flow.

motif.description: We shape ideas through clear framing, collaborative thinking, and a modern digital workflow.

visualCommunication.title: Visual Communication
visualCommunication.description: Clear design language for messages, campaigns, and brand presence.

productionSupport.title: Production Support
productionSupport.description: Practical coordination that helps ideas move from concept to finished output.

digitalServices.title: Design and Digital Services
digitalServices.description: Creative systems that work across screens, content, and launch assets.

creativeTraining.title: Music and Creative Training
creativeTraining.description: Learning and studio-facing support for creators who want to keep growing.

intro.title: Tripod is built to connect creative thinking with useful delivery.
intro.description: We work as a creative agency focused on multimedia production, visual communication, and practical execution that helps ideas become real brand and content outcomes.

points.title: Connected Services
points.description: Brand, design, production, digital work, and studio support can move together instead of feeling disconnected.

points.title: Clear Communication
points.description: Every project is shaped through direction that stays understandable, collaborative, and focused.

points.title: Practical Creative Execution
points.description: We care about strong ideas, but also about how those ideas get finished and used well.

mission.title: Help brands and creators communicate with more clarity and expression.
mission.description: Our mission is to turn ideas into thoughtful visuals, useful content, and production-ready outcomes that support real communication.

vision.title: Build a creative environment where storytelling and execution stay closely connected.
vision.description: We want Tripod to remain a space where design, multimedia production, and creative learning support each other in practical ways.

beliefs.title: Creative work is stronger when it stays human, structured, and useful.
beliefs.subtitle: Our beliefs guide how we shape ideas, collaborate, and deliver outcomes across different kinds of creative work.

storytelling.title: Story Before Noise
storytelling.description: Good visuals and campaigns work best when they carry a clear message and emotional direction.

collaboration.title: Shared Creative Process
collaboration.description: We believe the best outcomes come from active collaboration, useful feedback, and aligned expectations.

execution.title: Ideas Need Delivery
execution.description: Concepts matter, but real value shows up when creative work is organized well and delivered with care.

approach.title: A simple approach that keeps creativity moving with purpose.

discover.title: Discover
discover.description: We begin by understanding goals, audience, context, and the kind of story the work needs to carry.

strategy.title: Strategy
strategy.description: Direction is shaped into a practical plan for visuals, messaging, production support, and digital output.

create.title: Create
create.description: Design, content, media, and studio-facing work are developed with consistency and room for feedback.

deliver.title: Deliver
deliver.description: Final outputs are prepared clearly so they can be launched, shared, printed, published, or built on further.

culture.title: A culture shaped by curiosity, support, and steady creative momentum.
culture.description: Where real team photos are not yet available, we describe the environment through the kind of collaboration and energy the work is built around.

points.title: Youthful but Professional
points.description: We aim for energy, relevance, and strong taste while keeping work reliable and well organized.

points.title: Learning Mindset
points.description: Creative growth matters to us, whether the work is for a client project, internal development, or studio training.

points.title: Supportive Execution
points.description: The culture is built around helping ideas move forward with less friction and more confidence.

tiles.title: Team Flow
tiles.description: Ideas, reviews, and production tasks move in a rhythm that keeps momentum visible.

tiles.title: Shared Perspective
tiles.description: Different creative disciplines stay aligned through common direction and practical check-ins.

tiles.title: Flexible Thinking
tiles.description: We like room for exploration, but we keep that exploration connected to useful outcomes.

tiles.title: Creative Presence
tiles.description: The atmosphere supports brand work, production support, and learning without pretending to be something unconfirmed.

cta.title: If the creative direction fits, let’s start the conversation.

whatsapp.title: Prefer a direct message instead?

location.title: Find Tripod details here when they are ready.
location.placeholderText: A confirmed address has not been added yet, so this section stays clearly marked as a placeholder.

items.question: How does the booking form work?
items.answer: The form stays client-side only. When you submit valid details, it generates a WhatsApp message with your information and opens that chat.

items.question: Can I use WhatsApp without filling the whole form?
items.answer: Yes. The Instant WhatsApp card and final CTA both let you start a direct conversation without completing the full brief first.

items.question: What if I am not sure which service fits my project?
items.answer: Choose General Inquiry in the form or start a WhatsApp chat and describe the outcome you want. Tripod can help map the right service mix.

items.question: Does this page send my details to a backend?
items.answer: No. This phase uses a client-side flow only and does not create a database, API route, or email sending system.

cta.title: When you are ready, Tripod is one message away.
cta.subtitle: Send a project brief, ask a booking question, or start with a general creative inquiry.
